FREE GUIDE • 7-DAY RESET

7-Day Carnivore Reset Guide

Rebuild momentum, reduce cravings, simplify meals, and track how your body responds using CCC.

Start Free Check-In Read Guide
✔ Simple meals ✔ Daily focus ✔ Track with CCC
Metabo Reset
Your 7-day momentum plan
FREE CCC DASHBOARD PASS

Use CCC While You Do The Reset

During the 7 days, track energy, cravings, sleep, digestion, soreness, mood, and readiness inside Carnivore Command Center.

Start Free Check-In See Product

Use code RESET7 for free 7-day dashboard access when available.

How To Use This Guide

Keep it simple. Track daily. Look for patterns.

1

Keep Meals Boring

Use simple foods first: beef, eggs, bacon, chicken, fish, salt, and water.

2

Track Signals

Each day, note energy, hunger, cravings, digestion, sleep, and mood.

3

Win The Day

The goal is consistency, not perfection. Adjust based on your body signals.

Before You Start

Set yourself up before Day 1.

  • Pick a simple food list you can repeat for 7 days.
  • Decide your daily check-in time: morning or evening.
  • Remove trigger foods, snacks, sweeteners, alcohol, and “keto treats.”
  • Keep water and salt consistent.
  • Use CCC to track readiness and patterns.

Days 1–3: Build The Base

The first three days remove noise: simple food, hydration, and craving control.

DAY 1

Clean Start

Focus: Remove confusion. Keep food simple and get a baseline.

Action: Beef, eggs, bacon, chicken, fish, salt, water. Avoid snacks, sauces, sweeteners, alcohol, and keto treats.

CCC Check-In: Energy, hunger, cravings, digestion, sleep.

DAY 2

Hydration + Salt

Focus: Stop fake hunger and smooth out energy dips.

Action: Drink water early, salt food well, avoid grazing, and eat full meals.

CCC Check-In: Was the energy dip food, sleep, hydration, or stress?

DAY 3

Craving Control

Focus: Beat the urge window before it becomes a bad decision.

Action: Wait 10 minutes, drink water, eat protein if truly hungry, and walk 5 minutes.

CCC Check-In: When did cravings hit and what triggered them?

Days 4–7: Find The Pattern

Now you start connecting habits, food, sleep, and energy.

DAY 4

Sleep Reset

Focus: Recovery drives discipline, appetite, and performance.

Action: No late snacks, dim lights earlier, phone down earlier, keep dinner simple.

CCC Check-In: Sleep quality tomorrow morning.

DAY 5

Movement Day

Focus: Build momentum without punishment.

Action: 20-minute walk, light workout, mobility, stretching, or easy bike.

CCC Check-In: Did movement improve energy or cravings?

DAY 6

Pattern Check

Focus: Identify what helps or hurts.

Action: Review best energy day, worst craving day, best sleep, digestion, and mood.

CCC Check-In: What pattern is obvious now?

DAY 7

Lock The System

Focus: Make the next week repeatable.

Action: Pick your meal timing, food list, workout days, sleep target, and check-in time.

CCC Check-In: What will you repeat next week?

Simple Reset Food List

Don’t overcomplicate the first 7 days.

Primary Foods

  • Beef
  • Eggs
  • Bacon
  • Chicken thighs
  • Fish

Simple Add-ons

  • Butter
  • Tallow
  • Salt
  • Water
  • Black coffee if tolerated

Avoid For 7 Days

  • Keto treats
  • Sweeteners
  • Alcohol
  • Sauces
  • Random snacks
Use Your Signals. Win More Days.
You don’t need to guess anymore. Track your daily signals, get your score, and see what is actually moving your progress.
Start Free Check-In Browse Recipes
Remember: consistency beats perfect. Track it. Learn it. Improve it.
